name: BOOTS Starter - Northern Beachhead
description: 4 PLA amphibious brigades start at sea in the ship reserve for full offload. 4 ROC brigades defend the adjacent inland hexes. red_ship_reserve beach_hex + offset_bearing preserve each PLA brigade's landing target and seaward render offset for offload landing.

victory._comment: End-of-cleanup victory census of battalions ON TAIWAN. loss_check_arm: 'unconditional' (default) | 'after_first_landing' | 'after_turn:<N>'. taiwan_hexes: null counts ALL placed hexes (correct for this main-island scenario; offshore islands can't be distinguished until terrain/land data exists — see PLAN.md Victory conditions); set to a hex-id array to restrict the census.
